# Torensa: Free Video, PDF & Image Tools Online, No Signup Needed

> A comprehensive collection of free, browser-based tools for productivity, image processing, document conversion, file sharing, and developer workflows.

Torensa provides free online tools designed to enhance work efficiency, streamline file and image management, and facilitate quick digital sharing. Most tools run entirely in the browser — no file uploads to external servers, no login required, instant results.

## Business Tools

### Text to QR Code Generator - Free QR Builder Online
- Create scannable QR codes from plain text or links with live preview.
- Optionally add a logo and short label, then download the final image as PNG.
- Processing is done in-browser, so no input is uploaded.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Generate QR](https://torensa.com/qr-code-generator)

### Free Barcode Generator - Create Barcodes Online
- Create printable barcodes directly in your browser with support for common formats like Code 128, Code 39, EAN-13, EAN-8, and UPC-A.
- Customize width, height, and label display, then export the barcode as PNG.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Generate Barcode](https://torensa.com/barcode-generator)

### Invoice & Receipt Generator - Free Online Tool
- Build polished invoices or receipts with seller/buyer details, line items, taxes, shipping, discounts, and notes.
- Totals are calculated automatically, and the final document can be exported as PDF.
- Data stays local and can be reused in your browser.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Create Invoice](https://torensa.com/invoice-generator)

### Free Resume Builder - Create a Professional CV Online
- Create a job-winning resume or CV in minutes with this free online resume builder. Choose from professional, modern, or minimal templates.
- Add your personal details, work experience, education, skills, and a professional summary.
- Preview your resume in real time and download it as a clean, ATS-friendly PDF.
- Your data is saved locally in your browser — nothing is sent to any server.
- No sign-up, no watermark, no limits.
- Works offline too, so you can build your CV anywhere, anytime.
- [Build Resume](https://torensa.com/resume-builder)

## Document Tools

### Image & PDF Merger - Combine Files Online Free
- Combine multiple images and PDF documents into a single PDF file.
- Reorder items, rotate images, choose page size and margins, set fit behavior, and optionally add page numbers.
- Built with client-side processing for privacy and speed.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Create PDF](https://torensa.com/pdf-merger)

### PDF Splitter - Split PDF into Pages Online Free
- Upload a PDF and split it locally in your browser.
- Extract selected pages into a single PDF, or generate one PDF per page as a ZIP download.
- All processing runs on-device for privacy and offline use.
- [Split PDF](https://torensa.com/pdf-splitter)

### Word to PDF Converter - Convert DOCX to PDF Free
- Upload a Word document (.doc or .docx) and convert it to a PDF in seconds.
- Conversion runs on the server using LibreOffice, preserving fonts, tables, images, and formatting.
- Files are processed in memory and never stored.
- [Convert to PDF](https://torensa.com/word-to-pdf)

### Excel to PDF Converter - Convert XLSX to PDF Free
- Upload an Excel spreadsheet (.xls, .xlsx, or .xlsm) and convert it to a PDF in seconds.
- Conversion runs on the server using LibreOffice, preserving sheet formatting, tables, and charts.
- Files are processed in memory and never stored.
- [Convert to PDF](https://torensa.com/excel-to-pdf)

### PDF to Word Converter - Convert PDF to DOCX Free
- Upload a PDF and convert it to an editable .docx file.
- Conversion runs on the server using LibreOffice, preserving layout and text.
- Files are processed in memory and never stored.
- [Convert to Word](https://torensa.com/pdf-to-word)

### PDF Text Extractor (OCR) - Extract Text from PDF
- Upload any PDF — whether it contains selectable text or scanned images — and extract all readable text.
- Digital PDFs are parsed directly for perfect accuracy, while scanned pages are processed with Tesseract OCR.
- Copy the result to your clipboard or download as a .txt file.
- [Extract Text](https://torensa.com/pdf-text-extractor)

### Data File Converter - Convert CSV JSON XML Free
- Upload an Excel, CSV, or JSON file and convert it to either of the other two formats.
- All parsing and conversion happen client-side, so your files stay on your device.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Convert Files](https://torensa.com/data-format-converter)

### PDF Builder
- PDF Builder is a free, browser-based rich-text editor that lets you write, format, and export documents as PDF files — entirely offline, with no data ever leaving your device. Use the formatting toolbar to apply bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, headings (H1–H3), text alignment, bullet and numbered lists, custom font sizes, font families, and text or highlight colors.
- Choose between A4, Letter, or Legal page sizes and set a custom file name before downloading.
- Everything runs in your browser using html2canvas and jsPDF — no account or internet connection required after the page loads.
- [Build PDF](https://torensa.com/pdf-builder)

## Entertainment Tools

### Birthday Cake Generator - Create Realistic AI Birthday Cakes
- Create stunning, photorealistic birthday cake images in seconds using AI image generation powered by Hugging Face. Simply enter the birthday person's name and age, choose a theme (chocolate, floral, galaxy, and more), and the AI generates a professional-quality cake photo.
- Perfect for birthday cards, social media posts, or WhatsApp messages.
- Download as PNG or share directly.
- [Generate Cake](https://torensa.com/birthday-cake-generator)

### Festival Greeting Generator - Animated Diwali, Christmas & More
- Send a beautiful animated greeting for any festival in seconds.
- Choose a festival template (Diwali to start, more coming), pick or write a personalised message, add the recipient's name, and we'll generate an animated GIF with twinkling sparkles and your custom greeting.
- Perfect for sharing in WhatsApp groups, family chats, or social media.
- [Create Greeting](https://torensa.com/festival-greeting)

## Communication Tools

### Easy File & Text Sharing - Quick Share Tool Online
- Easy Share lets you send text and up to 5 files (up to 1 GB each) between devices in different networks using a 4-digit access code via internet.
- No signup, phone, or email is required.
- [Open Easy Share](https://torensa.com/easy-share)

### Bulk Email Sender - Send Mass Emails Free Online
- Compose and send bulk email campaigns from one place.
- Connect Gmail with OAuth, import recipients from Excel/CSV, personalize subject/body with placeholders, and attach files.
- Your SMTP configuration is stored per account and used to send through your own Gmail connection.
- Requires login.
- [Open Bulk Email](https://torensa.com/bulk-email)

## Image Tools

### Image Compressor - Reduce Photo File Size Online
- Reduce image file size directly in your browser with no uploads.
- Preview selected images immediately, tune compression quality, then compress and download files individually or as a ZIP archive.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Compress Images](https://torensa.com/image-compressor)

### Image Format Converter - Convert JPG PNG WebP Free
- Convert a single image between PNG, JPG, WEBP, and BMP formats in your browser.
- Pick source and target formats, then export instantly with no uploads or backend processing.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Convert Image](https://torensa.com/image-format-converter)

### Image Crop Tool - Crop & Resize Photos Online
- Select a crop area with pixel-level controls, preview the selected region, and export as PNG, JPEG, or WebP.
- Everything runs entirely in your browser, so images never leave your device.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Crop Image](https://torensa.com/image-crop-tool)

### Image Background Remover & Changer - Free Online
- Upload any PNG, JPG, or WEBP image and choose what to do with its background: remove it entirely to get a transparent PNG, fill it with a solid color of your choice, or composite it over a completely new background image.
- All processing is done server-side using AI segmentation, with a live before/after preview before you download.
- [Edit Background](https://torensa.com/image-background-editor)

### AI Image Generator - Create Art with AI Online
- Type a description of the image you want — anything from a realistic landscape to a creative illustration — and AI (Stability AI Stable Image Core via AWS Bedrock) will create it.
- Preview the result instantly and download as a high-resolution PNG.
- [Open Image Generator](https://torensa.com/image-generator)

## Data & Media Tools

### Song Identifier - Find What Song Is Playing
- Wondering what song is playing? Use your microphone to identify any song in seconds. This free online song finder records a short audio clip, recognizes it against a database of over 100 million tracks, and returns the song title, artist, album, and genre.
- Get direct streaming links to Spotify, YouTube Music, Apple Music, Amazon Music, and Deezer.
- Works with music from speakers, TV, radio, or even humming — no app install required.
- [Identify Song](https://torensa.com/song-identifier)

### Subtitle Downloader - Download Movie Subtitles Free
- Paste a video URL to fetch subtitles as an SRT file.
- The tool tries existing captions first, then falls back to auto-generated subtitles if available.
- Supports YouTube and other sites supported by yt-dlp.
- [Download Subtitles](https://torensa.com/subtitle-downloader)

### Speech to Text Converter - Transcribe Audio Free
- Upload an audio file and receive a clean transcript powered by Amazon Transcribe.
- Supports common audio formats like MP3, WAV, MP4, M4A, FLAC, OGG, and WEBM.
- AI-powered.
- [Open Speech to Text](https://torensa.com/speech-to-text)

### Video to MP3 WAV Converter - Extract Audio Free
- Upload a video file and extract the audio track as MP3 or WAV.
- Conversion runs on the server using FFmpeg.
- Files are processed in memory and never stored.
- [Extract Audio](https://torensa.com/video-to-audio)

### Voice Changer with Character Presets - Free Online
- Upload an audio file and apply character presets like deep narrator, tiny alien, husky man, or old lady.
- The conversion runs on the server using FFmpeg filters and returns a downloadable MP3 or WAV file.
- [Change Voice](https://torensa.com/voice-changer)

### ClearWave - Remove Background Noise from Audio Online
- ClearWave removes unwanted background noise from your audio files. Upload a recording with wind, hum, static, or ambient noise and get back a clean version.
- Choose from light, medium, or strong noise reduction.
- Supports MP3, WAV, M4A, AAC, OGG, FLAC, AMR, and WEBM formats.
- Processing runs on the server using FFmpeg's advanced FFT-based denoiser — no software install needed.
- [Clean Audio](https://torensa.com/clearwave)

### Text to Speech Converter - Convert Text to Audio
- Type or paste any text and hear it read aloud using the Web Speech API built into your browser.
- Choose from dozens of voices and languages, adjust speed, pitch, and volume, and control playback with pause, resume, and stop.
- Fully client-side — your text never leaves your browser.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Open Text to Speech](https://torensa.com/text-to-speech)

### CSV Builder
- CSV Builder lets you create and edit CSV files directly in your browser — no sign-up, no software to install. Start a blank spreadsheet, paste raw CSV text to convert it instantly, or upload an existing .csv file to edit it.
- The built-in spreadsheet view lets you rename columns, add or delete rows and columns, and edit individual cells with a click.
- Logged-in users can save their CSVs to their account and reload them at any time.
- When you're done, download the finished file as a clean, standards-compliant CSV.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Build CSV](https://torensa.com/csv-builder)

## Developer Tools

### Custom Chatbot Builder
- Custom Chatbot Builder lets you create an AI assistant trained on your own text in seconds — no coding required. Paste any plain text (product FAQs, support docs, company policies, onboarding guides) into the knowledge base editor and your chatbot is ready to answer questions immediately.
- Each bot is powered by AWS Bedrock (Claude) and answers strictly from the text you provide — it never guesses or makes things up.
- Share your chatbot with a public link, embed it on your website via the REST API, or test it directly in the chat panel.
- Supports multiple bots, persistent conversation history, editable knowledge bases, and per-bot API endpoints.
- [Build Chatbot](https://torensa.com/custom-chatbot-builder)

### Text Difference Checker - Compare Two Texts Online
- Paste two versions of text and view line-by-line differences, including additions, removals, and modified blocks.
- Useful for reviewing edits in content, configs, or code snippets.
- Everything runs locally in your browser.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Compare Text](https://torensa.com/text-diff-checker)

### JSON Formatter & Validator - Beautify JSON Online
- Paste JSON and run quick validation with readable error feedback.
- Format with indentation for readability or minify for compact payloads.
- This utility is fully client-side, making it fast and privacy-friendly for developer workflows.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Open JSON Tool](https://torensa.com/json-formatter-validator)

### Spring Boot Log Analyzer - Debug Java Logs Online
- Upload or paste Spring Boot logs to identify likely first-failure events, exception chains, stack-frame locations, and correlation-id clusters.
- Export a structured JSON incident report for sharing and follow-up debugging.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Analyze Logs](https://torensa.com/spring-boot-log-analyzer)

### AI Cron Expression Generator & Validator Online
- Use AI to generate cron expressions from plain English descriptions, or create them manually.
- Validate syntax instantly, get human-readable interpretations, and preview upcoming execution times.
- Supports both 5-field and 6-field formats.
- [Open Cron Tool](https://torensa.com/cron-generator-validator)

### JWT Encoder & Decoder - Parse JWT Tokens Online
- Inspect JWT header and payload, edit claims, and generate new tokens using HS256 or HS512 algorithms.
- Helpful for API testing and debugging authentication flows.
- Operations are performed in-browser without sending token data to a backend.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Open JWT Tool](https://torensa.com/jwt-decoder-encoder)

### UUID Generator - Create Unique IDs Online Free
- Create one or many UUID v4 identifiers with options like uppercase output or hyphen removal.
- Copy all generated values at once for use in development, testing, and data workflows.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Generate UUID](https://torensa.com/uuid-generator)

### String Encryptor & Decryptor - Encrypt Text Online
- Encrypt plain text into ciphertext and decrypt ciphertext back into readable text using a secret key with AES (crypto-js).
- Includes a server mode with PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA512 + AES-256 for Jasypt-style workflows and interoperability scenarios.
- [Open Encryptor](https://torensa.com/string-encryptor)

### Torensa API Forge - Test & Build REST APIs Online
- Torensa API Forge lets you send API requests directly in the browser, including JWT Bearer auth, custom headers, query/path parameters, and JSON/raw body.
- [Open API Forge](https://torensa.com/api-request-builder)

### SQL Formatter & Beautifier - Format SQL Online
- Paste any SQL query and instantly format it with proper indentation and line breaks for readability.
- Minify queries for compact storage, toggle keyword casing between UPPERCASE and lowercase, and choose your preferred indent style.
- Fully client-side — your SQL never leaves your browser.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Open SQL Tool](https://torensa.com/sql-formatter)

## health-wellbeing

### Habit Tracker - Track Daily Goals & Habits Online
- Build a list of habits you want to do every day, each with a custom point value. Check off completed habits daily to earn points.
- A bar chart shows your points over the last 14 days so you can track your consistency.
- All data is stored locally in your browser.
- Requires login.
- [Track Habits](https://torensa.com/habit-tracker)

### BMI Calculator (kg, cm, lb, ft) - Free Health Tool
- Calculate Body Mass Index (BMI) from your height and weight in seconds.
- Use metric (kg/cm) or imperial (lb/ft) units and see your BMI category on a color scale.
- Runs fully in your browser - your data never leaves your device.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Calculate BMI](https://torensa.com/bmi-calculator)

## Resources

- [All Tools](https://torensa.com)
- [Sitemap](https://torensa.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Privacy Policy](https://torensa.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://torensa.com/terms)

## Notes

- Most tools process data entirely client-side in the browser — no files are sent to external servers.
- Tools that require a server (document conversion, AI features, background removal, speech-to-text) process files in memory and do not store them.
- New tools are added continuously.
- Most tools require no account or login. Bulk Email Sender - Send Mass Emails Free Online, Habit Tracker - Track Daily Goals & Habits Online require login.
